text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You have been approved as a Moderator. We are thrilled to have you on the team — please check the moderator handbook and feel free to reach out if you have any questions.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you have joined us as an Event Helper. We look forward to working with you on upcoming events — say hi in the general channel!
Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 We are excited to have you join as a Mentor. Your experience will be a great asset to our community members. Head over to the mentors channel to get started!
